title: Immersion fixation and staining of multicubic millimeter volumes for electron microscopy-based connectomics of human brain biopsies
abstract: Mapping the complete synaptic connectivity of a mammalian brain via serial section electron microscopy requires membrane staining with osmium tetroxide throughout entire brains while preserving ultrastructure. This paper presents the ODeCO protocol for whole-brain staining applicable to human brain biopsies.
notes: Critical sample prep advance for human brain connectomics.
